notes: Frame 30 rerun on the same DexYCB sequence completed successfully in human3r. The grasped object is YCB id 18 (040_large_marker), not mustard_bottle. The object silhouette is therefore expected to be long and cylindrical. Visual roughness in world-space plots is amplified by triangle-edge rendering, but the decoded object mesh also shows a real sliver-face issue: about 27.4% of predicted faces have area < 1e-8 versus about 1.26% for GT.
